get.summary: GetSystem returns a specific system with metadata
GetSystemContent returns the SDL and recipe content for a system

sources.title:
Import sources for module resolution (name -> source config)
e.g., "stdlib" -> { builtin: true }, "patterns" -> { github: "panyam/sdl-patterns" }

designs.title: Designs within this workspace (each is a system architecture)

workspace.description:
Workspace is a project container holding multiple designs (system architectures).
Each design is backed by a Canvas for runtime simulation.
The workspace also declares import sources for module resolution.

post.summary: Load an SDL file into the workspace
Select the active system for simulation

get.summary: Get all design contents for a workspace
Get SDL content for a single design

order.title: Execution order (supports decimals for conditional paths)

condition.title: Condition expression if this is a conditional path

probability.title: Probability of this path being taken

generatorId.title: ID of the generator that originated this flow

v1DiagramEdge.title: DiagramEdge represents a connection between nodes

v1DiagramNode.title: DiagramNode represents a component or instance in the system

v1FileInfo.title: FileInfo represents information about a file or directory

v1FilesystemInfo.title: FilesystemInfo represents information about a mounted filesystem

v1FlowEdge.title: Represents a flow edge between components

v1ImportSource.description:
ImportSource declares where to resolve @name/ prefixed imports.
The runtime configures the appropriate resolver based on context
(CLI: disk/HTTP, WASM: memory/fetch, server: bundled/HTTP).

v1MethodInfo.title: MethodInfo represents information about a component method

v1SystemDiagram.title: SystemDiagram represents the topology of a system

v1SystemInfo.title: SystemInfo represents a system in the catalog

v1SystemProject.title: SystemProject represents a full system project

v1SystemVersion.title: SystemVersion represents a version of a system

isBottleneck.title: Whether this is the bottleneck resource

sources.title:
Import sources for module resolution (name -> source config)
e.g., "stdlib" -> { builtin: true }, "patterns" -> { github: "panyam/sdl-patterns" }

designs.title: Designs within this workspace (each is a system architecture)

v1Workspace.description:
Workspace is a project container holding multiple designs (system architectures).
Each design is backed by a Canvas for runtime simulation.
The workspace also declares import sources for module resolution.

name.title: System name as declared in SDL (e.g., "UberMVP")

file.title: SDL file path relative to workspace root

v1WorkspaceDesign.description:
WorkspaceDesign represents one system architecture within a workspace.
Maps to a `system` block in an SDL file, backed by a Canvas for runtime.
